title: Pinterest Enterprise Control Center — Wave 1 Cron Auth Fix

summary.problem: Wave 1 cron jobs (pe-matrix-15min, pe-operator-15min, pe-daily-report) used header secret 'cron-trigger' which did not match INTERNAL_FUNCTION_SECRET, causing 401 on every scheduled tick.
fix: Generated new PE_CRON_SECRET (48 chars) edge-function env var.
Patched pe-endpoint-matrix + pe-ai-operator isAuthed() to accept x-internal-secret matching either INTERNAL_FUNCTION_SECRET or PE_CRON_SECRET.
Added SECURITY DEFINER RPC public.pe_reschedule_crons(p_secret text) restricted to service_role; unschedules legacy jobs and reschedules with literal secret in http_post headers.
Added one-shot edge function pe-cron-bootstrap (verify_jwt=false, no caller-supplied input) that reads PE_CRON_SECRET from env and calls the RPC.
Invoked bootstrap; 3 new jobs scheduled (jobids 206/207/208) with the correct header secret.

verification.pe_daily_report_cron: scheduled at 0 4 * * * UTC, invokes pe-ai-operator with cron-daily trigger header (same auth path verified above)

regression_checks.admin_pinterest_health: no code changed in route; existing pinterest_* tables/functions untouched
regression_checks.admin_pinterest_enterprise_control_cente: only auth-helper expanded with additional accepted secret; behavior unchanged for admin JWT and INTERNAL_FUNCTION_SECRET callers
regression_checks.tsgo: no new TS files added; bootstrap function is Deno-only
regression_checks.existing_crons: no pinterest_* or non-pe cron jobs modified

remaining_blockers: ads:read / ads:write scopes — require Pinterest Reconnect Full Access (Standard Access)
catalogs:read / catalogs:write scopes — require Pinterest Reconnect Full Access (Standard Access)
billing:read scope — may require Pinterest Advanced Access / commerce_integration approval
pin_edit restricted feature — live pin PATCH still blocked pending Pinterest developer support approval
Wave 2/3 sync functions (pe-organic-sync, pe-ads-sync, pe-catalog-sync, pe-tracking-health, pe-conversion-funnel) not yet deployed
next_action: Proceed with Wave 2 (Organic + Ads + Catalog sync functions). Scopes will gate Ads/Catalog/Billing panels until user clicks Reconnect Full Access.
